overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character walking through a desolate coastal canyon and emerging onto a beach. The environment features dramatic rock formations, shifting lighting conditions, and a post-apocalyptic atmosphere with the character leaving glowing footprints.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon passage between high rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rocky canyon carrying a large backpack, leaving glowing orange footprints on the ground

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon
steep rock formation on the right side of the passage
rocky and uneven ground surface between the cliff walls
cloudy sky visible through the canyon opening above

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow canyon passage flanked by tall rock walls on both sides. The ground is rocky and uneven, with a cloudy sky visible overhead. The environment feels enclosed and desolate.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal shoreline with beach and ocean

events.description: exits narrow canyon onto open beach with ocean becoming visible to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline with ocean waves visible on the right side, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: calm sea water appearing on the right side of the frame
sandy shoreline replacing the rocky canyon floor
rock formations visible in the distance across the water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character emerges from the canyon onto a sandy beach. The ocean appears on the right while the left cliff recedes into the distance. The lighting becomes brighter as more sky becomes visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive beach with dramatic sky and sun rays

events.description: sun breaks through clouds creating dramatic rays and lens flare across the scene

agents.ego_description: walking toward the horizon as sunlight illuminates the scene through breaking clouds, creating a silhouette effect

entered.detail: large billowing clouds with breaks allowing sunlight through
crepuscular rays of sunlight streaming through cloud cover

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an expansive beach under a dramatic sky. The sun breaks through the clouds creating rays of light and lens flare effects. The landscape opens completely with distant landmasses visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic canyon that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched coastal expanse. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage flanked by towering rock walls under a heavy, cloudy sky. As the character moves forward, the enclosed space gives way to a sandy beach, with the ocean appearing to the right and the cliffs receding into the distance. The lighting then shifts from a dim, desolate gray to a bright radiance as the sun breaks through the clouds, casting dramatic rays of light and lens flares across the landscape. The scene finally expands completely, revealing a wide horizon with distant landmasses visible across the shimmering water.
